runTitle: Vercel Playwright QA - v8.11.69 Dashboard Navigation Contrast
coveredSurfaces: Vercel / landing render and system start
Vercel server detail tabs: overview, performance, logs/network
Local fix verification for dashboard navigation contrast

expertAssessments.rationale: The app shell routes render, but production left navigation text has insufficient contrast because global anchor color reset overrides Tailwind link color utilities.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Deploy the anchor reset specificity fix and re-run Vercel Playwright dashboard navigation contrast QA.

expertAssessments.rationale: The regression is now covered by a static CSS contract test and dashboard shell route tests continued to pass.
Production v8.11.69 remains affected until the source fix is deployed through the canonical pipeline.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Run the GitLab deploy path after local gates, then verify deployment SHA and Vercel UI.

usageChecks.summary: vercel usage reported effective=19.0897 USD, billed=0.0000 USD for the current billing period; no unexpected billed usage observed.

artifacts.label: Vercel v8.11.69 dashboard nav contrast regression
artifacts.note: Production screenshot shows left dashboard navigation inheriting light foreground on white aside.

artifacts.label: Local dashboard nav contrast fixed
artifacts.note: Local browser verification after global anchor reset specificity fix.

completedImprovements.title: Global anchor reset no longer overrides Tailwind text utility colors in local build
completedImprovements.evidence: src/app/global-effects.css uses :where(a) for text decoration and excludes text-* links from color inheritance reset; local Playwright computed colors confirm blue-700/slate-600 nav text.

pendingImprovements.title: Vercel production dashboard left navigation text contrast regression
pendingImprovements.note: Production v8.11.69 still shows left nav text as near-white on white. Source fix is local and needs deploy/recheck.

notes: Vercel route pack stayed functional, but release decision is no-go because dashboard left navigation labels are not readable on desktop.

Root cause: src/app/global-effects.css anchor reset loaded after Tailwind utilities caused links to inherit body text-foreground. The local fix removes color from :where(a) and applies inherit only to anchors without text-* classes.
Local verification: nav computed colors are active oklch blue-700 and inactive oklch slate-600 after restart.
